candidate_definition_hints.text: Winning Solution in NTIRE19 Challenges on Video Restoration and Enhancement (CVPR19 Workshops) - Video Restoration with Enhanced Deformable Convolutional Networks. EDVR has been merged into BasicSR and this repo is a mirror of BasicSR.
Note that this version is not compatible with previous versions. If you want to use previous ones, please refer to the `old_version` branch.
